<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  val create : ?description:string -> string -> unit Lwt.t
  val group_of_name :
    string -> (Types.Group.id * string * string option) Lwt.t
  val add_user_in_group :
    groupid:Types.Group.id -> userid:Types.User.id -> unit Lwt.t
  val remove_user_in_group :
    groupid:Types.Group.id -> userid:Types.User.id -> unit Lwt.t
  val in_group :
    ?dbh:PGOCaml.pa_pg_data PGOCaml.t ->
    groupid:Types.Group.id -> userid:Types.User.id -> unit -> bool Lwt.t
  val all : unit -> (Types.Group.id * string * string option) list Lwt.t
end >>
